title: Fix reaction to the edge event at zero time
body:
The `always @(posedge a)` block does not triggered on change of `a` in zero time.

The SV standard says that the "initial value of a static variable as part of the variable declaration (including static class
members) shall occur before any initial or always procedures are started." (chap. 10.5).

Example code:
```verilog
module test;
    logic a = 1'b0;
    logic b = 1'b0;

    always @(posedge a) b <= 1'b1;

    initial begin
        a = 1'b1;
        #1 $display("b = %b", b);
        $finish;
    end

endmodule // test
```

Expected output:
```
b = 1
```

Actual:
```
b = 0
```

Verilator version: 03012da11c54f614154400b01a12ad30ceeb8a30
